And locking extremely basic features behind a paywall is what did it for me.

so far the app is really great but there's one thing that is unacceptable. I bought pro for one whole year but cancelled the subscription auto renewal right away because I want to be aware of my subscriptions and manually extend/continue them. so I have currently >350 days left with pro - NEVERTHELESS the apps keeps constantly reminding me to stay pro/continue pro. that just wrong to go on my nerves for one year although I am pro. please start these reminders when there's one month left or so!

I changed fasting plan from 12 12 to 10 14. And it didn't saveold data, i mean it shows wrong fasting start time. And i cant change it, it is only 20 to 23 hours available, when i start at 16!!!! It is so demotivated! Please fix this bag ! And also another problem with weight, i can't check my old data and see progress. It s meaningless to write my weight if i don't see a progress!

I've been using Yazio for a long time now, and I have to say it was way better back in the day. They added ADs after EVERY. SINGLE. LOG and it's extremely annoying. And not only that, but they also removed the feature of you being able to add your meals for the next day in advance. This used to be my favorite tracking app and I have to admit it's still fine for tracking, just the constant reminder to pay pay pay is making me want to switch to another app. Genuinely ridiculous.

Been using this app every day to track my calories for the past few years and had no issues, it used to be the best free one of its kind around. But within the past year it's gotten significantly worse in every way. Redundant pop-ups and features you can't turn off, one ad after the other, UI changes that hurt the eyes. Now that you can no longer track your food ahead of time without paying I'm uninstalling. Ridiculous to lock such basic features that used to be free (!) behind a Paywall.

I pay for premium and it's been super helpful. Since the overhaul it's just cringe now. The animations and suggestions are infantilising and annoying. It might work for some people but a fuzzy animation and AI do the opposite. It's all just getting in the way and adding more steps to actually track my food. Just add a toggle in the settings to turn off animations, suggestions and AI. I'm already paying so I'm not sure why it needs to be forced on me. I won't be renewing my subscription.

If you are looking to track food for tomorrow on this app, be prepared to pay for a subscription now. I was enjoying the app until the recent update where they locked tracking food in advance behind a paywall. I like tracking in advance as meal prepping is an essential part of managing my diabetes and just a good tool for a healthy lifestyle. I do not see how tracking food for tomorrow is something that has to be locked behind a Pro subscription. In my opinion, it's a horrible change.

It was never great but the latest update made it unusable. There is no way to get rid of the buggy AI features and infantile Duolingo-style streaks and goals, not even for paying customers. All those "hurray, you are amazing, you managed to track something so you are the greatest person that ever lived"-popups slow the process of food tracking down, not to mention that they are insulting to every person above the age of three. I am switching to a different food tracker now.

I hate it when apps present themselves as free, make you fill a very elongated questionnaire only to reveal in the end(after you invested so much time and effort) that there is a paywall! very dishonest! shame on them!

The app was great before the rebranding but now it tries so much to sell you pro version so it becomes insanely irritating. After each one meal you add there is an unskippable window that screams at you BUY MY PRO VERSION. I usually don't review anything at all but this can't be left unnoticed. Incredibly awful user experience.

Don't buy the app !!! Development team isn't listening to the community nor reacting to any developement suggestions, even though many of them are a common sentiment. There's many small things with the app which make you pull your hair, and I have paid for the "premium". Their "help" is a chatbot. Bugs are not fixed. Reaching out doesn't help. They just roll with the popularity...

I used to genuinely like this app. Not anymore. Any foods you log get some AI slop "Tips" The can NOT be turned off, they are ALWAYS negative, no matter if you just had a piece of chocolate or a more fatty cut of meat. ("Try switching out fish sticks for grilled fish for less calories!") No. I sometimes wanna eat something unhealthy! LEAVE ME BE. Another thing: The stupid logo/mascot. I liked the apple icon, it was nice and simple. The weird monster in there now? Annoying, invokes rage.

Full edit: from 2 down to 1 star. I have been paying for this app since 2018. It got only worse with no possible options to change certain pop-ups and summaries and so on. I. Do. Not. Want. Them. The latest addition (AI food identification) is a nice whitewashing technique, and as such falls short because of the cr@p that is shoved down paying customer's throats. I do not care about other style choices, but the app has been rendered tedious. Steer clear!
Tips you can't turn off, long animations for streaks you can't turn off. I get some people benefit from the positivity, but I just want to track my calories.

I’m extremely disappointed with this app. I paid almost $53 expecting a quality experience, but it does not deliver on what it promises.The AI feature is especially frustrating. it feels inaccurate, unhelpful, and honestly poorly developed. it completely misses the mark. I asked for a refund to Google and it wasn't given, and I still want a refund back. For an app at this price point, the refund policy should be more customer-friendly. Will not recommend.

Does the job, but for crying out loud, let us turn off these new unskippable animations and AI suggestions. Even if somebody asked for it, many of us didn't. Used to be just great and simple, now it's been getting more time consuming every update. Forcing us into this, without any option to turn it off, no way you'll be getting a renewal on my subscription.

Stop adding useless, unskippable "features" nobody wants. I don't need a bad AI that I have to click away every single time I want to track food. I don't need nutrition tips that I have to click past every time I enter something. I'm already paying for premium to not have the annoying ads, so stop adding annoying unskippable features ffs. To address the generic dev response: the pop-ups literally reduce motivation to use your app, not increase it. I wanna track my calories, nothing else.

be prepared to pass a 15 minute "test" to tell the app all your life and receive obvious recomendations, then spinn the wheel numerous times until you win their damn add packed as prsent.. and finaly to discover that you need to pay for the pro version to use their AI feature! what a waste of time!!

The app is kind of annoying. the database sucked. the AI reader for food is usually off by enough to matter. paid for the whole year so guess I'm stuck with it for that long but it could use a lot of improvements.

The app spams me with advertisements for the pro version. The cookie consent form is very complicated and cumbersome to reject. I have to scroll far and disable a lot of buttons. As a free user it's unusable seriously. The AI function is restricted to pro. Also they make you spin a wheel where you first lose but then win a 85% off offer. And sometimes you get to spin it again and it spins the exact same way making you lose and the win at the exact angle My money is not for anti-user-app-design.

edit: there you go, case in point. even the reply to my complaint is an ad to upgrade. AI slop // original review: The constant bombarding of upgrade ads is getting ridiculous. Creating an artificial problem? check. Selling you the solution? check. Is it annoying? You best believe it!

Spent a lot of time answering many questions, and I couldn’t skip the premium suggestion screens, they appeared multiple times. The free version is very limited, and I couldn’t test the AI food recognition feature without a subscription. I have no motivation to buy a subscription without being able to check the functionality first, especially with such poor UX. Deleted the app.

This app is absolute junk. My wife and I bought an annual subscription and the food diary is garbage. it doesn't read barcodes well, has a very limited library of foods. just junk and trying to find a way to get a refund.

If you could stop spamming me with unnecessary banners after I log my meal that'd be great. Just add an option where I can disable all those "motivating" full screen banners please. Also there's an extremely annoying bug where the app asks me every time I'm logging my meal in which country I'm shopping...

Unbearable the volume of questions and pushing of the pay now. I've literally just created an account and downloaded the app.. Already making me want to delete before I can even try it. And now asking for a review when I've had the app 3 minutes.

Hi, can I have a refund? AI was my main selling point, it works ok, but after it has analyzed what the meal is, we cannot edit how much of it we ate? Absolutely garbage! I have spent 15 minutes answering stupid questions and finished by the request for the payment. Deleted and forgot. UPD: I am not about paying for the app. its OK. I am about the dozens of dubious questions before the first use of the app. I don't need a quiz, I need an app to count calories...

AI Camera requires MONEY. Not worth it. Edit: Thank you for your reply. I have since found 3 apps that has AI Calorie Camera feature. Therefore, I won't be needing your app. Thank you for understanding.

I bored to answer all the millions questions on the start of app, and I even not have the choice to skip. After millions questions you see subscription page, where you can't choice some free trial. had to fill 1000 questions survey, it asked to rate app instantly,not even tried. then after last question it asked my credit card info. Im not gonna pay for something I dont know how it will work. I better stay to paper and pen
Very disappointed, I paid for ai tracking but the camera was not working, i complained about this issue so they r still trying to fix it.
they dont even give you the chance to really try the app, they bombard you with ads and subscriptions with every move without you actually trying the app and getting to check if you like it or not

AI trash Tipps that are often just simply wrong. It has goten much more expensive for this reason. Aslo now in the latest update ingame adverts for their ADDITIONAL SUBSCRIPTION. Go **** a Duck Yatrashio!
uses the stereotypical web survey format where you have to answer a hundred questions before it tells you that you have to subscribe and the cheapest subscription is $24.

The devs decided it's a great idea to be greedy money grubbing goblins and put a function that used to be for free, behind a paywall. For the uninitiated: I am talking about the camera AI function. It used to be free and now it isn't, all in a single move to extort more money. Hence 1 star

I generally find it useful, but the recent update changed the entire design, ui, fonts, and colors in a way that is disorienting and especially in darkmode honestly painful to look at. The redesign is terrible, the pop-ups are annoying and useful features keep being hidden / moved around to be more difficult to access. Edit: the app is made worse and worse, it's just awful.
